transcript_facts:
* The patient reports palpitations.
* The patient reports palpitations that occur when stressed.
* The patient reports no recent joint pain.
* The patient reports no flare ups over the last year.
* The patient reports no reflux flare ups in the last five months.
* The patient reports nasal congestion due to allergies.
* The patient reports pain to palpation of the right elbow.
* The patient is taking methotrexate 2.5 mg once weekly.
* The clinician orders methotrexate 2.5 mg once weekly.
* The clinician refers the patient to cardiology for cardiac ablation.
* The clinician orders a referral to cardiology.
* The clinician prescribes protonix 40 mg a day.
